name: are-na
title: Are.na
description: Are.na is a platform for connecting ideas and building knowledge through visual blocks and channels. This Raycast extension allows users to search for channels, blocks, and users on Are.na, as well as create new channels directly from Raycast. Easily discover, explore, and organize content from your Are.na account without leaving your workflow.
author: alvinkobe

commands.name: search-all
commands.title: Search Everything
commands.subtitle: Are.na
commands.description: Search channels, blocks, users, and quickly rerun saved queries

commands.name: search-channels
commands.title: Find Channels
commands.subtitle: Are.na
commands.description: Search and browse through public and private Are.na channels

commands.name: search-blocks
commands.title: Find Blocks
commands.subtitle: Are.na
commands.description: Search for text, images, links and other content blocks across Are.na

commands.name: search-users
commands.title: Find Users
commands.subtitle: Are.na
commands.description: Search for people and organizations with Are.na profiles

commands.name: create-channel
commands.title: Create Channel
commands.subtitle: Are.na
commands.description: Quickly create a new public or private channel on your Are.na account

commands.name: my-profile
commands.title: My Profile
commands.subtitle: Are.na
commands.description: View your Are.na profile summary in Raycast

commands.name: my-channels
commands.title: My Channels
commands.subtitle: Are.na
commands.description: Browse channels from your Are.na account

tools.name: search-arena
tools.title: Search Are.na
tools.description: Search channels, blocks, and users on Are.na. Use for discovery, lookups, and when the user mentions topics, people, or channels without a direct URL.

tools.name: get-me
tools.title: Get My Are.na Profile
tools.description: Return the authenticated user's Are.na profile (name, slug, counts, profile URL). Use when the user asks who is logged in or refers to "my" account.

tools.name: list-my-channels
tools.title: List My Channels
tools.description: List channels owned by the signed-in user. Use for "my channels", inventory of the user's spaces, or picking a channel slug.

tools.name: get-channel
tools.title: Get Channel Details
tools.description: Fetch metadata for one channel by id or slug (title, visibility, owner, block count, web URL).

tools.name: get-channel-contents
tools.title: Get Channel Contents
tools.description: List blocks and nested channels inside a channel. Use after identifying a channel id or slug, or when the user wants to see what is inside a channel.

tools.name: get-block
tools.title: Get Block Details
tools.description: Fetch a single block by numeric id (text preview, source link, author, public block URL). Public block URLs use https://www.are.na/block/{id}.

tools.name: create-channel
tools.title: Create Channel
tools.description: Create a new channel on the user's Are.na account with a title and visibility (public, closed, or private). Requires user confirmation in Raycast before running.

preferences.name: accessToken
preferences.label: Personal Access Token
preferences.description: Optional personal access token. Leave blank to sign in with OAuth instead.
preferences.title: Personal Access Token

preferences.name: defaultPageSize
preferences.title: Default Page Size
preferences.label: Default Page Size
preferences.description: Default number of search results fetched per page

preferences.name: defaultSearchSort
preferences.title: Default Search Sort
preferences.label: Default Search Sort
preferences.description: Default sort mode for discovery commands

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
